title: Resurgam.
content:
At last to be identified!
    At last, the lamps upon thy side,
    The rest of life to see!
    Past midnight, past the morning star!
    Past sunrise! Ah! what leagues there are
    Between our feet and day!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Resurgam."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
